model.name: removeProperties
model.title: Remove Properties
model.description: Removes message exchange properties whose name matches a specified pattern
model.label: eip,transformation

id.description: Sets the id of this node. Important: If you want to set the id of the route, then you must use routeId(String) instead.

note.description: Sets the note of this node

description.description: Sets the description of this node

disabled.label: advanced
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

pattern.description: Name or pattern of properties to remove. Supports exact match, wildcard (ending with ), and regular expression (all case-insensitive).

excludePattern.label: advanced
excludePattern.description: Name or pattern of properties to not remove. You can use comma to separate multiple patterns.
